revision.text:
'''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神}}. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社}} ({{ill|Gose City|ja|御所市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社境外摂社)}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, {{ill|Osaka City|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)}} - Located in Kōdera-chō Yatabe, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Gotaku, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町深志野)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Fukashino, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)}} - Located in Yumesaki-chō Tera, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|八代大歳神社}} - Located in Yashiro Miyamae-chō, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja|大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)}} - Located in Hokujō, Kasai City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja|大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)}} - Located in Yachigusa, Fukusaki Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町福本)}} - Located in Fukumoto, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)}} - Located in Kashio, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja|大歳神社 (新温泉町)}} - Located in Shinonsen Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|ja|大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)}} - Located in Momoyama-chō, Kinokawa City, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja|大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)}} - Located in Inamihara, Inami Town, Hidaka District, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|ja|大歳神社 (下関市)}} - Located in Shimonoseki City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|天王宮大歳神社}} - Located in Tenno-chō, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Samino Shrine|ja|佐美長神社}} - Formerly known as "Ōtoshi Shrine," a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Izawa-no-miya|ja|伊雑宮}}, located in Isobe Town, Shima City, Mie Prefecture.
==Related Topics== * {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神}}

'''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神}}. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社}} ({{ill|Gose City|ja|御所市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社境外摂社)}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, {{ill|Osaka City|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)}} - revision.comment: 見出しの追加。表記の統一。住所の重複の削除とリンク設定。大年神社の追加。
revision.text:
'''大歳神社'''・'''大年神社'''（おおとしじんじゃ）は、[[年神]]（としがみ）を祀る、｢大歳｣・｢大歳」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
== 主な大歳神社 == * [[天王宮大歳神社 (浜松市)|天王宮大歳神社]] – [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[中央区 (浜松市)|中央区]][[天王町 (浜松市)|天王町]] * 大歳社 – [[三重県]][[志摩市]][[磯部町恵利原]] ： [[佐美長神社]]（[[伊雑宮]]所管社)。 * [[大歳神社 (京都市)|大歳神社]] – [[京都府]][[京都市]][[西京区]][[大原野]]灰方町 * [[大歳社 (大阪市)|大歳社]] – [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[住吉区]][[住吉 (大阪市)|住吉]] ： [[住吉大社]]摂社。 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市飾東町)|大歳神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]飾東町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市四郷町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市四郷町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市四郷町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市広畑区蒲田 ： [[蒲田神社 (姫路市)|蒲田神社]]摂社。 * [[八代大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市八代宮前町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市香寺町矢田部 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市御国野町御着 *[[大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市御国野町深志野 *[[大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市夢前町寺 * [[大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[加西市]]北条町北条 * [[大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[神崎郡]][[福崎町]]八千種 * [[大歳神社 (神河町福本)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県神崎郡[[神河町]]福本 * [[大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県神崎郡神河町柏尾 * [[大歳神社 (新温泉町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[美方郡]][[新温泉町]] * [[葛木御歳神社]] – [[奈良県]][[御所市]] ： 御歳神（御年神）を祭る神社の総本社。 * [[大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)|大歳神社]] – [[和歌山県]][[紀の川市]][[桃山町調月]] * [[大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)|大歳神社]] – 和歌山県[[日高郡 (和歌山県)|日高郡]][[印南町]]印南原 * [[大歳神社 (下関市)|大歳神社]] – [[山口県]][[下関市]][[竹崎町]]
== 主な大年神社 ==
* [[大年神社 (姫路市豊富町)|大年神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]豊富町神谷 * [[大年神社 (姫路市東延末)|大年神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市東延末 * [[大年神社 (和歌山市)|大年神社]] – [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]梅原 * [[大年神社 (大田市)|大年神社]] – [[島根県]][[大田市]]大屋町 * [[大年神社 (浜田市)|大年神社]] – 島根県[[浜田市]]宇津井町 * [[大年神社 (錦江町)|大年神社]] – [[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[錦江町]]
== 関連項目 == *[[葛木御歳神社]] *[[年神]] {{デフォルトソート:おおとししんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
'''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神}}. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社}} ({{ill|Gose City|ja|御所市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社境外摂社)}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, {{ill|Osaka City|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)}} - Located in Kōdera-chō Yatabe, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Gotaku, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町深志野)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Fukashino, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)}} - Located in Yumesaki-chō Tera, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|八代大歳神社}} - Located in Yashiro Miyamae-chō, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja|大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)}} - Located in Hokujō, Kasai City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja|大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)}} - Located in Yachigusa, Fukusaki Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町福本)}} - Located in Fukumoto, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)}} - Located in Kashio, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja|大歳神社 (新温泉町)}} - Located in Shinonsen Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|ja|大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)}} - Located in Momoyama-chō, Kinokawa City, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja|大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)}} - Located in Inamihara, Inami Town, Hidaka District, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|ja|大歳神社 (下関市)}} - Located in Shimonoseki City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|天王宮大歳神社}} - Located in Tenno-chō, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Samino Shrine|ja|佐美長神社}} - Formerly known as "Ōtoshi Shrine," a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Izawa-no-miya|ja|伊雑宮}}, located in Isobe Town, Shima City, Mie Prefecture.
==Related Topics== * {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神}}

revision.comment: 細部の編集。
revision.text:
'''大歳神社'''・'''大年神社'''（おおとしじんじゃ）は、歳神（[[年神]]）を祀る、｢大歳」｢大年」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
奈良県御所市の[[葛木御歳神社]]が総本社を称する。
== 主な大歳神社 == * [[天王宮大歳神社 (浜松市)|天王宮大歳神社]] – [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[中央区 (浜松市)|中央区]][[天王町 (浜松市)|天王町]] * 大歳社 – [[三重県]][[志摩市]][[磯部町恵利原]] ： [[佐美長神社]]（[[伊雑宮]]所管社) * [[大歳神社 (京都市)|大歳神社]] – [[京都府]][[京都市]][[西京区]][[大原野]]灰方町 * [[大歳社 (大阪市)|大歳社]] – [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[住吉区]][[住吉 (大阪市)|住吉]] ： [[住吉大社]]摂社 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市飾東町)|大歳神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]飾東町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市四郷町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市四郷町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市四郷町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市[[広畑]]区蒲田 ： [[蒲田神社 (姫路市)|蒲田神社]]摂社 * [[八代大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市八代宮前町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市香寺町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市御国野町御着 *[[大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市御国野町深志野 *[[大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市夢前町 * [[大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[加西市]]北条町 * [[大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[神崎郡]][[福崎町]]八千種 * [[大歳神社 (神河町福本)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県神崎郡[[神河町]]福本 * [[大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県神崎郡神河町柏尾 * [[大歳神社 (新温泉町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[美方郡]][[新温泉町]]居組 * [[大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)|大歳神社]] – [[和歌山県]][[紀の川市]][[桃山町調月]] * [[大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)|大歳神社]] – 和歌山県[[日高郡 (和歌山県)|日高郡]][[印南町]]印南原 * [[大歳神社 (下関市)|大歳神社]] – [[山口県]][[下関市]][[竹崎町]]
== 主な大年神社 ==
* [[大年神社 (姫路市豊富町)|大年神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]豊富町 * [[大年神社 (姫路市東延末)|大年神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市東延末 * [[大年神社 (和歌山市)|大年神社]] – [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]梅原 * [[大年神社 (大田市)|大年神社]] – [[島根県]][[大田市]]大屋町 * [[大年神社 (浜田市)|大年神社]] – 島根県[[浜田市]]宇津井町 * [[大年神社 (錦江町)|大年神社]] – [[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[錦江町]]馬場
== 関連項目 == *[[葛木御歳神社]] *[[年神]] {{デフォルトソート:おおとししんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神}}. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社}} ({{ill|Gose City|ja|御所市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社Keigai-Sessha)}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, {{ill|Osaka City|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)}} - Located in Kōdera-chō Yatabe, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Gotaku, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町深志野)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Fukashino, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)}} - Located in Yumesaki-chō Tera, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|八代大歳神社}} - Located in Yashiro Miyamae-chō, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja|大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)}} - Located in Hokujō, Kasai City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja|大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)}} - Located in Yachigusa, Fukusaki Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町福本)}} - Located in Fukumoto, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)}} - Located in Kashio, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja|大歳神社 (新温泉町)}} - Located in Shinonsen Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|ja|大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)}} - Located in Momoyama-chō, Kinokawa City, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja|大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)}} - Located in Inamihara, Inami Town, Hidaka District, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|ja|大歳神社 (下関市)}} - Located in Shimonoseki City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|天王宮大歳神社}} - Located in Tenno-chō, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Samino Shrine|ja|佐美長神社}} - Formerly known as "Ōtoshi Shrine," a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Izawa-no-miya|ja|伊雑宮}}, located in Isobe Town, Shima City, Mie Prefecture.

'''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神|1=Toshigami}}. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社}} ({{ill|Gose City|ja|御所市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社Keigai-Sessha)}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, {{ill|Osaka City|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)}} - Located in Kōdera-chō Yatabe, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Gotaku, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町深志野)}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Fukashino, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)}} - Located in Yumesaki-chō Tera, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|八代大歳神社}} - Located in Yashiro Miyamae-chō, Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja|大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)}} - Located in Hokujō, Kasai City, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja|大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)}} - Located in Yachigusa, Fukusaki Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町福本)}} - Located in Fukumoto, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)}} - Located in Kashio, Kamikawa Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja|大歳神社 (新温泉町)}} - Located in Shinonsen Town, Hyogo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|ja|大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)}} - Located in Momoyama-chō, Kinokawa City, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja|大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)}} - Located in Inamihara, Inami Town, Hidaka District, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|ja|大歳神社 (下関市)}} - Located in Shimonoseki City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|天王宮大歳神社}} - Located in Tenno-chō, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Samino Shrine|ja|佐美長神社}} - Formerly known as "Ōtoshi Shrine," a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Izawa-no-miya|ja|伊雑宮}}, located in Isobe Town, Shima City, Mie Prefecture.

/* 主な大歳神社 */
revision.text:
'''大歳神社'''・'''大年神社'''（おおとしじんじゃ）は、歳神（[[年神]]）を祀る、｢大歳」｢大年」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
奈良県御所市の[[葛木御歳神社]]が総本社を称する。
== 主な大歳神社 == * [[天王宮大歳神社 (浜松市)|天王宮大歳神社]] – [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[中央区 (浜松市)|中央区]][[天王町 (浜松市)|天王町]] * [[大歳神社 (飛騨市)|大歳神社]] – [[岐阜県]][[飛騨市]] * 大歳社 – [[三重県]][[志摩市]][[磯部町恵利原]] ： [[佐美長神社]]（[[伊雑宮]]所管社) * [[大歳神社 (京都市)|大歳神社]] – [[京都府]][[京都市]][[西京区]][[大原野]]灰方町 * [[大歳社 (大阪市)|大歳社]] – [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[住吉区]][[住吉 (大阪市)|住吉]] ： [[住吉大社]]摂社 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市飾東町)|大歳神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]飾東町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市四郷町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市四郷町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市四郷町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市[[広畑]]区蒲田 ： [[蒲田神社 (姫路市)|蒲田神社]]摂社 * [[八代大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市八代宮前町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市香寺町 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市御国野町御着 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市御国野町深志野 * [[大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市夢前町 * [[大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[加西市]]北条町 * [[大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[神崎郡]][[福崎町]]八千種 * [[大歳神社 (神河町福本)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県神崎郡[[神河町]]福本 * [[大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県神崎郡神河町柏尾 * [[大歳神社 (新温泉町)|大歳神社]] – 兵庫県[[美方郡]][[新温泉町]]居組 * [[大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)|大歳神社]] – [[和歌山県]][[紀の川市]][[桃山町調月]] * [[大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)|大歳神社]] – 和歌山県[[日高郡 (和歌山県)|日高郡]][[印南町]]印南原 * [[大歳神社 (下関市)|大歳神社]] – [[山口県]][[下関市]][[竹崎町]]
== 主な大年神社 ==
* [[大年神社 (姫路市豊富町)|大年神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]豊富町 * [[大年神社 (姫路市東延末)|大年神社]] – 兵庫県姫路市東延末 * [[大年神社 (和歌山市)|大年神社]] – [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]梅原 * [[大年神社 (大田市)|大年神社]] – [[島根県]][[大田市]]大屋町 * [[大年神社 (浜田市)|大年神社]] – 島根県[[浜田市]]宇津井町 * [[大年神社 (錦江町)|大年神社]] – [[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[錦江町]]馬場
== 関連項目 == *[[葛木御歳神社]] *[[年神]] {{デフォルトソート:おおとししんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
'''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity [[:en:Toshigami|Toshigami]]. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Mitoshi Shrine|lt=Katsuragi Mitoshi Shrine|lt=Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社Keigai-Sessha)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|qq=}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]], Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|qq=}} - Located in Kōdera-chō Yatabe, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|qq=}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Gotaku, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町深志野)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|qq=}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Fukashino, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|qq=}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大歳神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11436758]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity [[:en:Toshigami|Toshigami]]. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Mitoshi Shrine|lt=Katsuragi Mitoshi Shrine|lt=Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社Keigai-Sessha)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]], Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kōdera-chō Yatabe, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Gotaku, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町深志野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Fukashino, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yumesaki-chō Tera, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|八代大歳神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Yashiro Miyamae-chō, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja|大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hokujō, Kasai City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja|大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yachigusa, Fukusaki Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町福本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Fukumoto, Kamikawa Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kashio, Kamikawa Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja|大歳神社 (新温泉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shinonsen Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|ja|大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|qq=}} - Located in Momoyama-chō, Kinokawa City, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja|大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Inamihara, Inami Town, Hidaka District, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|ja|大歳神社 (下関市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|qq=}} - Located in Shimonoseki City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|天王宮大歳神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tenno-chō, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * [[:en:Saminaga Shrine|Samino Shrine]] - Formerly known as "Ōtoshi Shrine," a subordinate shrine of [[:en:Izawa-no-miya|Izawa-no-miya]], located in Isobe Town, Shima City, Mie Prefecture.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大歳神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大歳神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大歳神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11436758]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōtoshi Shrine''' (大歳神社) refers to Shinto shrines that enshrine the deity [[:en:Toshigami|Toshigami]]. It may also be written as Ōtoshi Jinja.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Mitoshi Shrine|lt=Katsuragi Mitoshi Shrine|lt=Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|ja|葛木御歳神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Otochi Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]) - The head shrine of all shrines dedicated to Ōtoshi no Kami. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja|大歳神社 (住吉大社Keigai-Sessha)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Sumiyoshi Taisha Geigai Setsusha)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Sumiyoshi, [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]], Osaka Prefecture. * [https://otoshijinjya.wixsite.com/my-site Ōtoshi Shrine (Ōharano, Kyoto City)] - Located in Ōharano, Nishikyō Ward, [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市香寺町矢田部)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Kōdera-cho Yatabe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kōdera-chō Yatabe, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町御着)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Gotaku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Gotaku, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市御国野町深志野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Mikunino-chō Fukashino)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Mikunino-chō Fukashino, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja|大歳神社 (姫路市夢前町寺)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Himeji, Yumesaki-cho Tera)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yumesaki-chō Tera, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|八代大歳神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Yashiro Miyamae-chō, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja|大歳神社 (加西市北条町北条)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kasai, Hokujō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hokujō, Kasai City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja|大歳神社 (福崎町八千種)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Fukusaki, Yachigusa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yachigusa, Fukusaki Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町福本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Fukumoto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Fukumoto, Kamikawa Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja|大歳神社 (神河町柏尾)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kamikawa, Kashio)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kashio, Kamikawa Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja|大歳神社 (新温泉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Shinonsen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shinonsen Town, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|ja|大歳神社 (紀の川市桃山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Kinokawa, Momoyama-chō)|qq=}} - Located in Momoyama-chō, Kinokawa City, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja|大歳神社 (日高郡印南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Hidaka District, Inami Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Inamihara, Inami Town, Hidaka District, Wakayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|ja|大歳神社 (下関市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi Shrine (Shimonoseki)|qq=}} - Located in Shimonoseki City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja|天王宮大歳神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ōgū Ōtoshi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tenno-chō, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * [[:en:Saminaga Shrine|Samino Shrine]] - Formerly known as "Ōtoshi Shrine," a subordinate shrine of [[:en:Izawa-no-miya|Izawa-no-miya]], located in Isobe Town, Shima City, Mie Prefecture.
==Related Topics== * [[:en:Toshigami|Toshigami]]
